description:
Another sneak peek from HABROMANIA, this time featuring the Inventory Menu. Had a ton of fun designing this one- I have always loved immersive dietetic UI in games, and I wanted her inventory to look like a real workspace with little knick-knacks she'd picked up on her adventure. Working on polishing all the systems we have in place now, to make sure everything all nice and pretty for yall when the demo drops.



(btw, don't smoke, kids.)
(Just because Alice does it doesn't mean you should.)
(Alice does a lot of things you shouldn't do.)
fulltitle: HABROMANIA GAMEPLAY Sneak Peek 4 - Inventory Menu
